name: NexGel Inc Common Stock
summary: NexGel, Inc. is a bio-tech company focused on developing and commercializing high-water-content hydrogels for wound care and other medical applications. Headquartered in Lawrence, Massachusetts, the company aims to leverage its proprietary technology to create advanced products for managing wounds and improving patient outcomes. NexGel's business model involves manufacturing and distributing hydrogel-based products to healthcare providers and consumers.
